title: Collapse release skills to one (GitHub-only) + update CLAUDE.md/versioning docs
description: Release model simplified to GitHub-only (see memory project_release_model_github_only). Collapse the 3 release skills (mpi-merge-branches + mpi-apply-patch + mpi-release-public) into ONE release skill: bump a version digit (2nd = new features, 3rd = fixes - now the SAME mechanical op), build portable, publish a GitHub release. No branch merging, no Patreon tiers, no Cloudflare pre-release links. mpi-version-bump stays as the file-edit mechanic; mpi-release-shared build-dispatch.md + copy-review.md stay; link-model.md + r2-upload.md go dead for releases (R2 still used for model WEIGHTS). Then update CLAUDE.md (Context Router + MPI Skills/Procedures tables), .claude/rules/versioning.md, docs/versioning.md, docs/releases/*, and mpi-end step 3 (release-awareness names the old skills). Get per-file approval for rule/CLAUDE.md edits.
